applied_optimizations.name: Initial Triton kernel implementation
applied_optimizations.description: Single-kernel Triton implementation with 3-pass algorithm (mean, variance, normalize). Uses BLOCK_SIZE=4096, one program per (batch, group) pair. Produces correct output but is ~2x slower than PyTorch reference.

attempted_but_failed.name: Two-kernel approach (compute stats + apply)
attempted_but_failed.reason: Kernel launch overhead added latency, 10.1ms vs 9.95ms for single kernel
attempted_but_failed.error: Initial version had type error with tl.store for scalar values

attempted_but_failed.name: 2D block processing
attempted_but_failed.reason: Shape compatibility error with 2D tensor operations

notes: PyTorch reference: 5.08ms using two specialized kernels (RowwiseMoments 51%, elementwise 49%)
Triton baseline: 9.95ms using single kernel with 3 sequential passes
Key optimization opportunity: fuse mean/variance computation into single pass using Welford's algorithm or similar
Another opportunity: use 2D grid for more parallelism

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output — 3 consecutive failures. Agent needs a complete, copy-pasteable implementation to overcome whatever blocking issue it's hitting. Providing full working code with the 2-pass

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 5 is the 4th consecutive failure with no output. The agent is clearly stuck on code generation/execution. Providing complete copy-pasteable code for a 2-pass GroupNorm kernel that fuses sum+sum_
